executionHistory.summary: Created 6-artifact bug packet from system review finding TR-001. Identified that dev-token-smackerel-2026 bypasses existing placeholder validation. Fix: add to reject list, add dev-token-* prefix check, change YAML default to empty string.

Commit 43e93cf: Added dev-token-smackerel-2026 to placeholder reject list, added dev-token-* prefix check (case-insensitive) in config.go, changed smackerel.yaml auth_token to empty string, added TestValidate_AuthTokenDevTokenPrefixRejected.
All unit tests pass. TestValidate_AuthTokenDevTokenPrefixRejected covers literal, prefix, and case-insensitive rejection. No existing tests broken.
Re-verified DoD items against committed code via grep on internal/config/config.go and config/smackerel.yaml; focused go test -count=1 -run TestValidate_AuthToken... passed (ok 0.006s).
./smackerel.sh check ran clean (Config is in sync with SST + env_file drift guard: OK). YAML default change honoured by generated env files.
Bug re-certified done. All 6 DoD items checked with file:line evidence; report.md carries Test/Validation/Audit Evidence sections from this re-cert pass.
